creative_process_loop.rule: Read the current goal, runtime state, HNC proof, harmonic affect, Auris node status, voice/expression profile, repo state, and existing role memory before creating.
Declare who owns the work, what is being made, where it may act, when it is allowed to act, and which authority gates apply.
Create only through the role-approved Aureon route, using whole-organism context without exceeding authority.
Reject or hold output when HNC proof, master formula, Auris nodes, coherence, runtime freshness, or safety boundaries are missing or stale.
Attach render, playback, build, test, source, or evidence proof before claiming the work is finished.
Publish who/what/where/when/how/act, snags, handoffs, and next actions; keep handover hidden while blockers remain.

organism_mind_contract.sentience_boundary: Aureon uses synthetic self-monitoring, metacognition, voice, HNC/Auris, and sensory-state reports as operating evidence; this report does not assert human subjective consciousness.

proof_checklist.label: HNC, master formula, and Auris nodes pass

who_what_where_when_how_act.act: Hold or clear agent creative handover based on the proof checklist and snagging list.

who_what_where_when_how_act.when: Before any agent claims creative work is ready for client handover.
